description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by large windows and a few sections of light gray and beige paneling. The front features a small porch area with a visible entryway, and the property is surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, adding a landscaped feel. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with larger panes on the front and side facades. The roof is flat and appears to have a slight overhang, typical of contemporary bungalow designs. The overall structure is compact, with a clear emphasis on simplicity and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with various trees. The design is clean and rectangular, featuring a small front porch and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows, with trees flanking the facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat roof, extended side windows, and more of the landscaped yard with clustered trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance or patio area, additional windows, and a driveway or parking space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and a more open yard with scattered trees.
